acceptance: Default configure, build, CTest, and version command pass.
verification: `cmake --preset default`; `cmake --build --preset default`; `ctest --preset default`; `build/default/aria2-next --version` all passed. The version command reported Aria2 Next 2.1.4 with BitTorrent enabled.
notes: Local linker warning for a missing Homebrew Tcl/Tk search path did not fail the build.

acceptance: aria2-next completes a legal public torrent through libtorrent without a 99 percent tail stall or false active state.
verification: Sequential Debian 13.5.0 amd64 netinst torrent smoke completed before the 180 second RPC sample; final RPC active result was empty; console result was OK at 6.9 MiB/s average; SHA-256 matched the reference download.
notes: Artifacts are under `/Users/sekiro/Desktop/aria2-next-current/btm011-smoke-140641`; raw logs are not committed.

acceptance: aria2-next behavior is compared against qBittorrent/libtorrent or another libtorrent CLI on the same network without claiming deterministic public-network performance.
verification: Sequential comparison used Homebrew aria2c and a minimal libtorrent-rasterbar 2.0.12 smoke client. aria2-next completed before 180 seconds, reference aria2c completed before 90 seconds, and the libtorrent smoke client completed at 86 seconds. All produced the same ISO SHA-256.
notes: Public swarm speed remains operationally variable; this proves completion and same-network order-of-magnitude behavior, not a deterministic benchmark.
